scripts.install:all: npm run install:gateway && npm run install:loan && npm run install:device && npm run install:frontend
scripts.prisma:loan: cd backend/loan-service && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.prisma:device: cd backend/device-service && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.prisma:all: npm run prisma:loan && npm run prisma:device
scripts.start:backend: concurrently -n GATEWAY,LOAN,DEVICE -c blue,green,yellow "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:loan" "npm run start:device"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n GATEWAY,LOAN,DEVICE,FRONTEND -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:loan" "npm run start:device" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:all
scripts.project:start: npm run setup && npm run start:all
